response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years across web, mobile, and high-performance backend work, but the role is fundamentally C++-centric and his C++ exposure is minimal and dated — limited to a six-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a university thesis. His modern stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, with no evidence of the specifically required competencies: STL-based C++ architecture, message brokers, MQTT, IEC 62443 secure development lifecycle, or industrial automation. While his low-latency/async and distributed-systems background is transferable, the core technical and security requirements are not met.
strengths: Deep experience with high-performance, low-latency, async/concurrent systems (DLang microservices handling millions of req/s)
Mature engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development, and architectural ownership
Broad full-stack and distributed-systems background spanning embedded, backend, and platform work
concerns: C++/STL experience is minimal and over a decade old; no recent hands-on C++ delivery
No evidence of message brokers, MQTT/REST IoT, or IEC 62443 / SDL secure-engineering experience
No industrial automation or relevant protocol exposure (Modbus, OPC UA, DNP3, etc.); currently on a career gap
